title: Gumel's Shrine UI [Cursed Fate]
description: This resourcepack changes the base Player Menu and Combat Bar for Cursed Fate into a shrine inspired design.
body:
![Player Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9db1c0b5068739206be12eb34004fb08692b10d3.png)
# Shrine UI [Cursed Fate]
This resourcepack's function is to alter the **player menu** and **combat bar** of the mod **Cursed Fate** into a Heian Era Sukuna inspired design. Feel free to make your own texturepacks using this as a template, but please leave credit!

**NOTE**: This resourcepack does not alter binding vow menus, gege's dialogue UI, etc. Some menu buttons such as the skills and cursed accessory abilities have unalterable textures, meaning I couldn't fully match the menu.

(This texturepack looks best with the red cursed energy color!)

Credits:

**gumelthemodeler** - artist, **imnothuragan** - mod creator
